name: FinOps Dashboard - Cost Optimization
description: Cloud spend, cost allocation, unit economics, and optimization opportunities for FinOps teams

cards.name: Cloud vs On-Prem Costs
cards.description: Cost comparison between cloud and on-premises infrastructure

native.query: SELECT deployment_model, monthly_cost, pct_of_total FROM v_cloud_vs_onprem_costs ORDER BY monthly_cost DESC

cards.name: Cost by TBM Tower
cards.description: Monthly cost breakdown by TBM resource tower

native.query: SELECT tbm_resource_tower, total_monthly_cost, pct_of_total_cost FROM v_cost_by_tower GROUP BY tbm_resource_tower, total_monthly_cost, pct_of_total_cost ORDER BY total_monthly_cost DESC

cards.name: Unit Economics - Top Services
cards.description: Unit economics for top business services by revenue ratio

native.query: SELECT business_service, monthly_cost, cost_per_transaction, cost_per_customer, revenue_ratio FROM v_unit_economics WHERE revenue_ratio > 0 ORDER BY revenue_ratio DESC LIMIT 10

cards.name: Budget Variance by Cost Center
cards.description: Budget variance analysis by cost center

native.query: SELECT cost_center, cost_pool_name, monthly_budget, actual_monthly_cost, monthly_variance, variance_pct FROM v_cost_allocation_summary ORDER BY ABS(variance_pct) DESC LIMIT 10

cards.name: Cost Trends by Environment
cards.description: Monthly cost trends segmented by environment

native.query: SELECT month, environment, SUM(monthly_cost) AS monthly_cost FROM v_cost_trends WHERE month >= NOW() - INTERVAL '6 months' GROUP BY month, environment ORDER BY month

cards.name: Depreciation Summary
cards.description: Asset depreciation summary with remaining book value

native.query: SELECT ci_name, ci_type, current_book_value, remaining_months, depreciation_pct FROM v_depreciation_summary WHERE fully_depreciated = FALSE ORDER BY current_book_value DESC LIMIT 10

cards.name: Cost Optimization Opportunities
cards.description: Top opportunities for cost optimization based on utilization

native.query: SELECT ci_name, ci_type, COALESCE((tbm_attributes->>'monthly_cost')::DECIMAL, 0) AS monthly_cost, COALESCE((metadata->>'utilization_pct')::DECIMAL, 0) AS utilization_pct, COALESCE((tbm_attributes->>'monthly_cost')::DECIMAL, 0) * (1 - COALESCE((metadata->>'utilization_pct')::DECIMAL, 0) / 100) AS potential_savings FROM cmdb.dim_ci WHERE is_current = TRUE AND ci_status = 'active' AND (metadata->>'utilization_pct')::DECIMAL < 50 ORDER BY potential_savings DESC LIMIT 10

cards.name: Cost Distribution by CI Type
cards.description: Cost distribution across different CI types

native.query: SELECT ci_type, SUM(total_monthly_cost) AS total_monthly_cost FROM v_cost_by_tower GROUP BY ci_type ORDER BY total_monthly_cost DESC LIMIT 8
